items.title: Legit the best
items.summary: I do Wuwa, HSR, Honkai3rd, Silver and blood, ZZZ, and more BUT! Im legit blown away by how clever and well made this game is. Translation is odd at times but the story/music/gameplay is all 5/5* definitely give it ago. You dont need to spend money to enjoy it either (but i do anyway to support the devs) LETSGOOO
items.author: BlueblueStars
